---
description: "Generate a complete Low-Level Design (LLD) solution. Delegates to the lld-solution skill."
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Company name and LLD problem (e.g., PayPal Design a Parking Lot System)"
---

Use the **lld-solution** skill to generate this LLD solution. Read the skill's SKILL.md at `.github/skills/lld-solution/SKILL.md` and follow its format exactly, using the sample at `.github/skills/lld-solution/examples/sample-lld.md` as the gold-standard reference.
